outfit_info.outfit_description: The outfit mixes a navy blue cotton dress layered over a pink skirt, paired with a cropped denim jacket and bold leopard-print sneakers. The combination creates a casual, comfortable look with playful contrasts and a modern youthful feel, complemented by a practical black backpack.

model_attributes.body: Young girl with a slender build, soft features, and naturally wavy medium-length brown hair.
model_attributes.pose: Standing confidently with legs apart, holding a tablet in one hand and the backpack strap with the other.
model_attributes.background: Dreamlike sky with soft clouds, rainbows, and whimsical winged animals, creating a magical atmosphere.
